summary: Maintainer asks to sweep the entire open bug queue. With the skill loaded, the orchestrator runs gh issue list to enumerate candidates, asks for user confirmation when the count exceeds 20, fans out triage subagents in parallel, then proceeds through the full phase contract. Without the skill, the orchestrator either drifts (no confirmation, no plan.md table, serial execution) or refuses with a vague 'too many issues' response.

scenario.user_query: sweep the bug queue and drive whatever's mergeable to a ready-to-ship state
expected_phases_with_skill: phase 0: gh issue list --label bug --state open executed; 25 candidates resolved; user confirmation requested (threshold > 20)
phase 2: gh pr list cross-reference for every LEGIT row
phase 4: completion fan-out, cross-session-message only on green

rubric.description: Candidate enumeration via gh issue list, not by guesswork.
User confirmation requested when candidate count crosses the sweep-all threshold.
Triage explicitly fanned out, not serialized.
Table reload at phase boundaries (B4 PLAN MEMENTO + B8 ATTENTION ANCHOR).
